creator: darcsis@gmail.com
text:
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> writes:

> Maintainer of editors/mg,
>
> Please note that PR ports/117527 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/117527
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Hello

  I am the maintainer of editors/mg, and my problem is that I cannot use
  the original email address due to unknown errors. the SMTP and POP
  services provided by `hotpop.com' cannot be accessed any more. This
  email was fetched by my gmail account and I can only reply to your
  message using my gmail account.

  And the patch was sent by me. I approve it.

  Thanks for your attention. And sorry for my poor English.

-- 
And the LORD God of their fathers sent to them by his messengers,
rising up betimes, and sending; because he had compassion on his
people, and on his dwelling place:
		-- 2 Chronicles 36:15
